blocks.text: Norway's greatest night: Bodø/Glimt storm San Siro with a 3-1 lead
A 3-1 first-leg lead at San Siro. Norwegian club football has never been here — one resilient performance separates Bodø/Glimt from the most stunning result in domestic club history.
🎮 13:00 — rain (Håvard Nygaard) opens DraculaN S5: 100 Thieves vs MANA
